detail.instructions: Define Request with method: String, path: String, and body: Option<String>.

hints.body: Keep the request data owned so it can outlive the builder.
The body may be absent, which makes Option a good fit.
Use clear field names that match the API vocabulary.

detail.completionExplanation: A focused Request struct gives the API a stable output type. Owned fields keep the request independent from temporary builder input.
